title: Floral, Fluffy Poached Pistachio Crust
description: This floral and fluffy dessert features a keto-friendly poached pistachio crust made from ready-to-roll shortcrust pastry dough.
instructions: Place the sheet of Pistachio Crust Dough on a lightly floured surface.
Cut out a circle slightly larger than your desired crust size and set aside.
In a small saucepan, combine Heavy Cream, Vanilla Bean Extract, Sugar, chopped Pistachios, and Rose Water over medium heat. Stir until the sugar dissolves.
Bring to a gentle simmer then remove from heat immediately. Pour into prepared dough circle evenly distributing the mixture.
Using tongs or a spatula, gently transfer the filled crust onto an oven-safe dish lined with parchment paper (if using).
Bake for 15 minutes until golden brown and set.
Remove from oven and allow to cool before removing from crust.
